response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems work; their background is primarily in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile apps with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or C++-centric system design.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with diverse tech exposure
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and dev practices
Active open-source contributions and architectural initiative
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ experience (NI LabWindows), far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrable cloud compute platform ownership or distributed systems leadership
Lacks evidence of mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or setting architectural standards at scale
